pro_brother.song_name: Everybody Wants To Rule The World

content:
"Everybody Wants To Rule The World" - Tears For Fears

(Standard Tuning / No Capo)

This is based off the original, studio recorded version (https://youtu.be/aGCdLKXNF3w).

[Chords]
[ch]A/D[/ch]   xx022x
[ch]G/D[/ch]   xx000x
[ch]Gmaj7[/ch] 3x0002
[ch]D/C[/ch]   x30232

This is the riff that shows up throughout the song.  Those are four groups of triplet eighth-notes over
the song's 4/4 shuffle tempo.  You could consider the song to be in 12/8.  In that case, those
are simply eighth-notes.

[tab]e|---5----7---5----5----7---5-|
B|-7---7----7----7---7----7---|
G|----------------------------|
D|----------------------------|
A|----------------------------|
E|----------------------------|[/tab]

[Intro]
[ch]A/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]  [4x]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
         Welcome to your life[/tab]
[tab][ch]A/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
         There's no turning back[/tab]
[tab][ch]A/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
         Even while we sleep[/tab]
[tab][ch]A/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
         We will find you[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
Acting on your best behavior[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
Turn your back on mother nature[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]A/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]A/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
Everybody  wants to rule the world[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
         It's my own design[/tab]
[tab][ch]A/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
         It's my own remorse[/tab]
[tab][ch]A/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
         Help me to decide[/tab]
[tab][ch]A/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
         Help me make the[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
Most of freedom and of pleasure[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
Nothing ever lasts forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Everybody  wants to rule the...[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
There's a room where the light won't find you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
Holding hands while the walls come tumbling down[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
When they do I'll be right behind you[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
So glad we've almost made it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
So sad they had to fade it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]        
Everybody  wants to rule the...[/tab]

[Instrumental Bridge]
[tab]   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [4x]
...world[/tab]
   [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]D/C[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]D/C[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]

[Guitar Solo]
[ch]A/D[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]  [4x]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
I can't stand this indecision[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
Married with a lack of vision[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]      
Everybody  wants to rule the..[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
Say that you'll never never never never need it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
One headline why believe it?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Everybody  wants to rule the world[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
All for freedom and for pleasure[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
